title: Ditrichospermum secundum

The classification of Ditrichospermum secundum is as follows: it belongs to the genus Ditrichospermum and the species D. secundum. The classification of Ditrichospermum secundum is further divided into the kingdom Plantae and the phylum Magnoliophyta.
